text.title: Productized Service Design Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Missing required fields; violates schema constraints for `productized-service-design`. Validator rejects with explicit violation list.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: canvas_ref missing or not matching a real canvas id
